questions.question: James says friendship with the world is what toward God?
questions.feedback: Friendship with the world means enmity toward God.

questions.question: James says if you resist the devil, what will he do?
questions.feedback: Resist the devil and he will flee from you.

questions.question: James says your life is like a mist that appears for a little while and then vanishes.
questions.feedback: What is your life? You are a mist that appears briefly and then vanishes.

questions.question: _____ yourselves before the Lord and he will lift you up.
questions.feedback: Humble yourselves before the Lord and he will lift you up.

questions.question: Anyone who knows the good they ought to do and doesn't do it, for them it is _____.
questions.feedback: If you know the good you ought to do and don't do it, it is sin.
